series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to: hiring documents such as employee applications, resumes, interview notes, position descriptions, employment agreements, transcripts, certificates, letters of recommendation and other documents relative to the position; personnel actions; tax forms; medical or personal information; criminal records; employee FMLA, EAP, disability, and workers compensation; letters of resignation; any other record maintained as part of the official employee personnel file. NOTE: The Ohio Department of Administrative Services (DAS) is responsible for archiving and permanently maintaining employee files for the state. DAS routinely receives the required documents through the procedures that enact personnel actions.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: period specified electronic format ; Electronic: seven (7) years employee leaves employment EXCEPTION RETENTION PERIOD: As set forth in collective bargaining agreement and Ohio Administrative Code, certain documents must be removed from official employee personnel file a specified length of time. Refer current collective bargaining agreement and applicable OAC provisions. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
